title: Otomoto ranking system
longDescription: Searching the internet looking for a car sale offer which would best meet my expectations, I decided to employ data analytics. Instead of daily browsing new offers on otomoto.pl, I wrote a program which - using web scraping - collects key information about all the offers which match some general conditions and then calculates overall scoring for them and saves the results to a database. Such a script can be automatically executed each day and so all the offers of interest would be be stored and (in theory) ranked. Moreover, once a week a script which gets several best offers from the database and saves them to an excel worksheet along with offers' links is executed. Finally, I added a dashboard which allows for convenient visualization of all the offers, comparing them to the others.

posts.postDescription: Presentation of the projects assumptions and the methodology adopted
Data acquisition using web scraping techniques
Searching for the best offers based on a metric created
Data visualization with a use of an interactive dashboard
